description_long: This is a modern residential bungalow enclosed by a wooden fence, featuring a flat-roofed main building with a light gray exterior. The property includes a paved yard, a row of four small outbuildings or garages with curved roofs, and a cluster of tall coniferous trees providing landscaping along one side. There is a rectangular pool or water feature in one corner of the yard, and a small patio area adjacent to the main building. The main entrance is accessible from a paved walkway leading through the fenced gate. The overall layout is organized and spacious, with clear separation between the living area, utility structures, and outdoor amenities.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with a fenced yard, multiple outbuildings, landscaping trees, and a pool feature.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, row of garages, and landscaped trees along the side.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the pool, garages, and the arrangement of trees within the fenced yard.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the main building, garages, and a single tall tree near the corner.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the pool, trees, and the main building's side facade.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with scattered windows on multiple facades
